first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the assessment of the candidate's qualifications based on the location change from Berlin to Bucharest.
